mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_name, password_hash, email, phone, avatar_url, status, is_super_admin, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (user_id, user_name, password_hash, email, phone, avatar_url, status, is_super_admin, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{isSuperAdmin}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
user_name = #{userName}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
